{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232032190026C981259EF6698965"}"},"total":8157},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7099094856194867976","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"走“黑星流”的书很多，但写的好的却几乎没有，这本不仅写的好，还结合了模拟器、无限流，真当值得一阅。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1652886979,"group_id":"7088578978524433422","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2560097955097325"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7088578978524433422","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.278856e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9278,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7098929512678851365","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"优秀！npc流+模拟器流+伪诸天流 的难得好书！剧情也张弛有度，设计合理，不水不拖，毫无毒点。
下面是几条建议:
1.主角职业超凡化，体系化。建议像斗气、法力一样给主角的漫游枪手职业加一个核心能力，比如说《超凡机械师》的械力。
2.女主、女性角色方面一定要谨慎。无女主或后期单女主是比较稳妥的，多女就很考验作者笔力了。","text_exts":[{"e":108,"s":105,"text":"机械师","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%BA%E6%A2%B0%E5%B8%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774269139F6698965%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227098929512678851365%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227088578978524433422%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%BA%E6%A2%B0%E5%B8%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1652848402,"group_id":"7088578978524433422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你好呀～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1yxjx/xABSRMSY22z4/tOoauOOFa/Pz6Z5L153vQ01Y","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a7f00faf8790480a927391665430dfd5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793309&x-signature=LixqFPSrE0Of8ZbRZa5fjPb85Zk%3D","user_id":"2560097955097325","user_name":"赤赤哦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2560097955097325","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1683099968,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7088578978524433422","book_info":{"abstract":"周宁穿越到游戏《天启》开服之前，成了一个带着玩家面板的NPC。玩家们不久之后就将降临！
没有关系，但谁能告诉我，游戏面板上的这个穿越模拟器是怎么回事？
穿越过程中，他曾与萧伯纳谈笑风生，曾与迪奥·布兰度结为好友，曾与灭霸执刃而战，曾成为小丑颠覆整个世界，也曾登上过至高王座，颠覆过无数王国。
当玩家真的降临的时候，才发现游戏世界画风彻底变了。钢铁侠战衣什么东西？霸王色霸气什么东西？青眼白龙什么东西，欧西里斯的天空龙什么东西？恶魔果实又是什么东西啊？！游戏里有这种东西吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f9eb414a0e2954265ed525bc7a352ad6","author":"碧玉刀","author_id":"","book_id":"7088578978524433422","book_name":"玩家降临，还好我有穿越模拟器","book_short_name":"成神模拟器","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7089010086294585871","read_count":"59077","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3911858"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1653","tags":"游戏体育,系统,穿越,无限流,同人,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/35578d82df0aeb21a82e720f15818f77~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453139&x-signature=Mq7XAPoFhr8oUSU5emnXmhpqYb4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"94848280279","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.932597e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232032190026C981259EF6698965"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":59,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7932,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":108611},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7261421085798925092","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我说这么精彩一本书，评分高达9.4，怎么人气这和书的评价完全不匹配？原来是在去年九月到今年五月之间断档过八个月，就很离谱，不过真的期待作者把这本书写下去，你当初要是没有断更这几个月，人气绝对会比现在高的多，加油吧，作者"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690681459,"group_id":"7088578978524433422","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2792402639391021"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7088578978524433422","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.653511e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读23小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":35318,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":81852,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7261418867900023615","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"人物刻画的细节很清晰，除主角之外，其他人刻画也很好，剧情也是跌宕起伏，非常不错的一本游戏类穿越小说，希望作者坚持下去，能不能每天更三章两章真的不够看，我有时候只好十几天不看攒一起，否则的话被卡住了，好难受啊，今天给你送了三个免费的赞，希望你继续加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690680911,"group_id":"7088578978524433422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+/ky9g551vu2+L9Kod2TP5lEH0CHnr4kOWHe8e0/hYd","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"2792402639391021","user_name":"霁夜之茶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2792402639391021","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7088578978524433422","book_info":{"abstract":"周宁穿越到游戏《天启》开服之前，成了一个带着玩家面板的NPC。玩家们不久之后就将降临！
没有关系，但谁能告诉我，游戏面板上的这个穿越模拟器是怎么回事？
穿越过程中，他曾与萧伯纳谈笑风生，曾与迪奥·布兰度结为好友，曾与灭霸执刃而战，曾成为小丑颠覆整个世界，也曾登上过至高王座，颠覆过无数王国。
当玩家真的降临的时候，才发现游戏世界画风彻底变了。钢铁侠战衣什么东西？霸王色霸气什么东西？青眼白龙什么东西，欧西里斯的天空龙什么东西？恶魔果实又是什么东西啊？！游戏里有这种东西吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f9eb414a0e2954265ed525bc7a352ad6","author":"碧玉刀","author_id":"","book_id":"7088578978524433422","book_name":"玩家降临，还好我有穿越模拟器","book_short_name":"成神模拟器","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7089010086294585871","read_count":"59077","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3911858"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1653","tags":"游戏体育,系统,穿越,无限流,同人,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/35578d82df0aeb21a82e720f15818f77~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453139&x-signature=Mq7XAPoFhr8oUSU5emnXmhpqYb4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"94848280279","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.5689788e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232032190026C981259EF6698965"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10
